name: Job Application Cover Letter
description: A professional cover letter format to complement your CV, highlighting your suitability and motivation for a role.
content:
{{full_name}}
{{address}}
{{phone}}
{{email}}
{{#if linkedin_portfolio}}LinkedIn/Portfolio: {{linkedin_portfolio}}{{/if}}

{{formatDate date}}

{{company_name}}
{{#if attention_to}}Attn: {{attention_to}}{{else}}Hiring Manager{{/if}}
{{company_address}}

RE: Application for the Position of {{position_applied}}

Dear {{#if attention_to}}{{attention_to}}{{else}}Hiring Manager{{/if}},

I am writing to express my strong interest in the {{position_applied}} position at {{company_name}}, as advertised on {{source_of_listing}}. With my background in this field and my commitment to professional excellence, I am confident that I am a strong candidate for this role.

Why Me? (Qualifications and Value):

{{suitability_summary}}

Why {{company_name}}?

{{motivation_summary}}

My resume is attached for your review. I am eager to bring my unique skills to your team and contribute to the continued success of your company.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of discussing my application with you further.

Sincerely,

{{full_name}}

fields.name: attention_to
fields.label: Recipient Name or Dept. (Optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Ms. Jane Smith / HR Manager

fields.name: source_of_listing
fields.label: Where did you see the ad?

fields.name: suitability_summary
fields.label: Why are you a good fit? (Summary)
fields.placeholder: Highlight your key skills and achievements.

fields.name: motivation_summary
fields.label: Why do you want to work here?
fields.placeholder: Mention your interest in the company's vision or culture.
